---
title: "Spatial Maps in Voting Advice Applications: The Case for Dynamic Scale Validation"
author: "Germann, M., Mendez, F., Wheatley, J. and Serdült, U."
date: 2015-06-01
description: "Acta Politica, 50(2): 214–238"
categories: [Applied Political Communication]
image: images_publications/journal-article.png
---
